data.auto_republish: Automatically republish virtual devices on startup
data.reverse_enabled: Enable reverse control from plan44 to Home Assistant

error.entity_not_found: The selected entity was not found.
error.kind_mismatch: The selected entity domain does not match the chosen virtual device type.
error.sensor_not_numeric: The selected sensor does not currently have a numeric state.
error.already_configured: A virtual device for this entity already exists.

init.title: plan44 options
init.description: Add a web API user + password to import physical devices from a live list. The web UI is reached over HTTPS at the host you configured during setup.

data.auto_republish: Automatically republish virtual devices on startup
data.reverse_enabled: Enable reverse control from plan44 to Home Assistant

user.title: Add virtual device
user.description: Export a Home Assistant entity to plan44 for remote control and monitoring.

pick_device.title: Import a plan44 device
pick_device.description: Pick a device read live from your plan44 bridge. Its channels (sensors and inputs) are imported automatically and polled via the web API.

manual.title: Import a plan44 device (manual)
manual.description: No web API configured — enter the device manually. The tag is the plan44 device id (e.g. `enoceanaddress:00123456`); pick the matching profile so its channels become Home Assistant entities.

custom.title: Single sensor details
custom.description: Configure the one channel to import.

error.p44_tag_required: A plan44 device tag is required.
error.web_api_unreachable: Could not reach the plan44 web API — check the web user/password (and URL) in the integration options. You can still enter a device manually below.
error.web_api_no_devices: The plan44 web API returned no importable devices. You can enter a device manually below.
